CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-20-2011 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-22-2011 Continued To Jun-03-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order For Issuance Writ Of Attachment
Off Calendar Nov-05-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
C. Griffith Towle, Esq., Bartkozankel, 415-956-1900, for plaintiff and moving party.

No other appearance. Plaintiff attorney presented to the court a valid proof of service. No opposition was filed.
The tentative ruling is vacated and PLAINTIFFS LFG NATIONAL CAPITAL, LLC, and LFG SERVICING LLC, A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY's Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order For Issuance Writ Of Attachment is Granted as to Brain I. Glicker and as to Glicker & Associates. Orders signed in open Court. Judge: Charlotte W. Woolard; not reported.
